name: Lamb Appetizer
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim crusts from bread.
2. Brush one side of each slice with melted butter and sprinkle with celery seeds.
3. Cut each slice into 3 strips and place on a baking sheet.
4. Bake at 425°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Blend the lamb, mayonnaise, onion, paprika, lemon juice, and chives in a bowl until well combined.
6. Spread about 1 1/2 teaspoons of the meat mixture onto each toast strip.
7. Garnish with pimiento strips or parsley sprigs.
